title: Green Path Terracotta Rolled Rim Plastic Planter
features: Terracotta coloured plastic bowl pots with drainage holes
Frost proof and high UV resistance
description: From the manufacturer Frame Company specializes in offering a select range of quality ready-made picture and photo frames. With a wide selection of sizes, styles, materials and finishes to choose from our approach is a simple one; to offer our customers choice, value for money and excellent levels of service. Picture Frames Our ready-made picture and photo frames are made to order in our workshop. With a wide selection of styles, sizes and materials you are sure to find the perfect frame for you. Framed Mirrors Choosing from a wide variety of picture frame mouldings we are able to offer you quality hand-made framed mirrors in various styles and sizes. Framed Art Prints With an extensive library of prints to choose from we have carefully curated a selection of prints which perfectly complement our picture frames. Personalised Prints Designed by our in-house illustrators we are proud to present our selection of personalised framed prints. Especially designed for those special occasions, these are sure to make the perfect gift.
